attacks.finding: Weakened if blind, shuffled, voting, and no-ranking arms preserve field quality; still bounded to the fixed interaction window.
Blind ranking hides mechanism labels during scoring and reattaches them only for audit.
Shuffled ranking randomizes candidate order before scoring with deterministic per-case seeds.
All ranked arms keep the Proof 039 cap of 5 candidates per case.
Survives in bounded form because all arms still operate over the same precomputed interaction window.

invalidated_claims: Ranking strategy has no effect on final pathway choice.
The interaction window itself was independently randomized.
surviving_claims: The delayed-ranking advantage is not unique to the exact Proof 039 ranking order.
The interaction field contains valid pathway combinations before winner selection.
Ranking strategy changes preserve multi-mechanism candidates.
